description: Conflict resolution rules when on-device score engine (Level 2) disagrees with Claude LLM (Level 3). Defines who wins in each scenario.

architecture.level_1: ML Kit detection (POINT) — what is the object?
architecture.level_2: On-device rule engine (SEE/SNAP) — score, flag, classify
architecture.conflict_point: Level 2 says 'swap' (score < 50) but Level 3 says 'product_buy' — who wins?

resolution_rules.name: safety_always_wins
resolution_rules.description: Safety-related flags from ANY level override purchase recommendations
resolution_rules.example: User allergic to peanuts → even if Claude says 'great product', show allergen warning

resolution_rules.name: score_low_llm_buy
resolution_rules.description: Score engine says unhealthy (< 50), Claude recommends buying

details.explanation: If Claude provides contextual reasoning (e.g., 'good for post-workout recovery despite sugar content'), LLM wins. Otherwise score wins.

resolution_rules.name: score_high_llm_swap
resolution_rules.description: Score engine says healthy (>= 70), Claude recommends swapping

details.explanation: Claude may have dietary preference context (e.g., user is keto, so high-carb item should be swapped even if generally healthy)

resolution_rules.name: score_mid_llm_agree
resolution_rules.description: Both agree the product is moderate (score 50-69)

resolution_rules.name: no_score_llm_only
resolution_rules.description: Score engine has no data (fresh produce, unpackaged food), LLM provides info

resolution_rules.name: no_llm_score_only
resolution_rules.description: LLM call failed or timed out, only score engine data available

resolution_rules.name: both_agree_buy
resolution_rules.description: Score high (>= 70) and Claude says buy — full green light

resolution_rules.name: both_agree_swap
resolution_rules.description: Score low (< 50) and Claude says swap — clear swap recommendation

resolution_rules.name: animal_detection_no_conflict
resolution_rules.description: Animal detections don't have score vs LLM conflicts

details.step_2: care info from LLM if requested

resolution_rules.name: plant_toxicity_override
resolution_rules.description: If toxic_plants.json says toxic, it overrides any LLM 'safe' response
resolution_rules.explanation: Curated toxicity data is more reliable than LLM for safety-critical plant identification

resolution_rules.name: medication_never_recommend
resolution_rules.description: Never let LLM recommend taking or buying medication
resolution_rules.disclaimer: SnapSense does not provide medical advice. Consult your healthcare provider.

resolution_rules.name: unknown_item_llm_decides
resolution_rules.description: For unknown/unrecognized items, LLM is the sole decision maker

precedence_order: score_high_llm_swap (priority 2 — LLM wins with diet context)
